goal: Culture Calendar code change: deliver the task while preserving AI-review quality (evidence-grounded, category-specific reviews) and nanochat-style repo minimalism.
_note: Open-weight cross-family panel (Anthropic excluded as maker family). Each juror is a distinct family per the llm-council family-exclusion invariant: DeepSeek, Xiaomi MiMo, MiniMax — all open-source / open-weight. tool_choice defaults to a FORCED record_review call; MiniMax M3 only supports tool_choice:auto on OpenRouter (it rejects forced), so it is annotated tool_choice:auto and placed in the synthesis slot, where an occasional non-call degrades to 'synthesis skipped' rather than blocking the gate. Slugs verified live against OpenRouter /models + a tool-call smoke test on 2026-06-05; re-verify when the frontier moves. persona_spec_path is relative to the repo root (council-judge.sh is invoked there in every gate).
